tree.name: Jimmy Butler III
tree.tradeDescription: 5-team trade: GSW traded Kyle Anderson, Andrew Wiggins, and 2025 1st (GSW own, became Jakucionis #20) to MIA; GSW traded Dennis Schroder, Lindy Waters III, and 2031 2nd (GSW own) to DET; MIA traded Jimmy Butler and cash to GSW; DET traded K.J. Martin to UTA; MIA traded Davion Mitchell from TOR, cash and 2026 2nd (LAL own) to TOR; MIA traded Josh Richardson and cash to UTA; UTA traded P.J. Tucker to TOR

assetsGivenUp.name: Andrew Wiggins
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: GSW traded D'Angelo Russell, Jacob Evans, and Omari Spellman to MIN for Andrew Wiggins, 2021 1st (became Kuminga #7), and 2021 2nd (became McBride)
assetsGivenUp.note: Former #1 overall pick, 2022 All-Star

assetsGivenUp.name: D'Angelo Russell
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Sign-and-trade: GSW signed Kevin Durant as FA and traded him with 2025 2nd to BKN for D'Angelo Russell, Treveon Graham, and Shabazz Napier
assetsGivenUp.note: 2019 All-Star, acquired in KD sign-and-trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Kevin Durant
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent from Oklahoma City Thunder. Sent to BKN in sign-and-trade July 2019.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jacob Evans
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 28th overall by GSW in 2018

assetsGivenUp.name: Omari Spellman
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: GSW traded Damian Jones and a 2026 2nd round pick to ATL for Omari Spellman
assetsGivenUp.note: Villanova forward, 2018 #30 pick by Atlanta

assetsGivenUp.name: Damian Jones
assetsGivenUp.note: Vanderbilt center, drafted 30th overall by Golden State

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: GSW own 2nd rounder sent to Atlanta in Spellman trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Kyle Anderson
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 6-team sign-and-trade: GSW traded Klay Thompson to DAL; MIN traded Kyle Anderson to GSW; PHI traded Buddy Hield to GSW
assetsGivenUp.note: UCLA forward, acquired via 6-team sign-and-trade from Minnesota

assetsGivenUp.name: Klay Thompson
assetsGivenUp.note: Washington State guard, drafted #11 overall by Golden State. 4x NBA champion. Left via sign-and-trade to Dallas after 13 seasons.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2031 2nd Round Pick (via DAL)
assetsGivenUp.note: GSW own 2nd rounder sent to MIN as part of 6-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations
assetsGivenUp.note: Cash sent to MIN as part of 6-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Dennis Schroder
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: GSW traded De'Anthony Melton, Reece Beekman, 2026 2nd (ATL own), 2028 2nd (ATL own), and 2029 2nd (GSW own) to BKN for Dennis Schroder and 2025 2nd (MIA own, became Koby Brea #41)
assetsGivenUp.note: German veteran PG

assetsGivenUp.name: De'Anthony Melton
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed via mid-level exception from Philadelphia. Out for season with torn ACL at time of trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Reece Beekman
assetsGivenUp.note: Virginia guard, 2024 2nd round pick. Signed to two-way July 3, 2024.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick via ATL
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from ATL in GP2 4-team trade Feb 2023, sent to BKN

assetsGivenUp.name: 2028 2nd Round Pick via ATL
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from ATL in GP2 4-team trade Feb 2023, sent to BKN

assetsGivenUp.name: 2029 2nd Round Pick via GSW
assetsGivenUp.note: GSW own 2nd rounder sent to BKN

assetsGivenUp.name: Lindy Waters III
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: GSW traded Quinten Post to OKC for Lindy Waters III
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from OKC on draft night 2024

assetsGivenUp.name: Quinten Post
assetsGivenUp.note: Boston College center, drafted 52nd overall by GSW in 2024, immediately traded to OKC

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#20)
assetsGivenUp.note: GSW own first-round pick sent to MIA in Jimmy Butler trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2031 2nd Round Pick via GSW
assetsGivenUp.note: GSW own 2nd rounder sent to DET as part of Butler 5-team trade
